metadata.rationale: 本文の数値関係と市場の方向感は、提示された画像群の内容と整合しており、主要指数、日経先物、ドル円の説明に重要な矛盾や文脈の取り違えは確認できない。画像はいずれも本文が述べる相場状況をそのまま補強しており、視覚的改変やクロスモーダル不整合も見当たらない。

prediction.predicted_label: verdict=Mostly False | taxonomy=T1 Fabrication; V1 Synthetic Visual Content

It also shows "日経時間外" (Nikkei After Hours) at +3.56% and 52,881, which aligns with the text's claim of a ~3.5% rise to around 53,000. The visual evidence strongly supports the specific numerical claims in the text regarding the Japanese market data.

The news text cites specific closing figures for the Nikkei Average (51,063.72, -1.58%) and TOPIX (3,497.86, -1.26%) on March 31. The image clearly displays these exact figures in the top-left ("日経平均") and middle-left ("TOPIX") panels respectively. The text also mentions a ~3.5% rise in night futures, which corresponds to the "+3.56%" shown in the top-right panel ("日経時間外"). Thus, the image data corroborates the news report.

No identifiable people, landmarks, or brand logos are visible beyond these financial-index labels and flag icons.

prediction.taxonomy_rationale: The text and images depict stock market indices (Nikkei ~51k, Dow ~46k) that are significantly higher than real-world values, indicating fabrication of data (T1), and the high probability of fake image suggests the visual content is synthetic (V1), while the high match confidence confirms they are consistent with each other.
